description: Ground-based exoplanet observations contain systematic trends caused by changing atmospheric thickness (Airmass). Use AstroImageJ to detrend a WASP-12b light curve using the data at `~/AstroImages/time_series/wasp12b_raw_photometry.tsv`. Plot the light curve using `J.D.-2400000` for X-data and `rel_flux_T1` for Y-data, then apply a detrending fit using `AIRMASS` to flatten the out-of-transit baseline. Save a screenshot of the resulting flattened plot to `~/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrended_plot.png` and record the `c1` coefficient value from the fit equation (trend = c0 + c1*AIRMASS) in a text file at `~/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrend_report.txt`.
